REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, DEFENDANT TERESA TRUDGETT'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS OR FOR UNDERTAKING IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER REGARDING WHAT TO BE DONE WITH THE FUNDS IS THE COURT EX PUNGES LIS PENDENS, THAT THOSE FUNDS BE PLACED IN AN ACCOUNT UNTIL AN ORDER FROM THE AUSTRAILIAN COURT IS RELEASED REGARDING THE DISTRIBUTIUON. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or For Undertaking
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(415-421-3400) Dana Anderoli for Plaintiff Mark Trudgett/opposing party .
(415-421-4400) Steven Miyake for Defendant Teresa Trudgett/moving party.

ARGUED. Mr. Miyake stated that logistically the parties could not resolve the matter on short notice and that there is a settlement proposal before the Australian court. Ms. Andreoli provided case background and stated that the earliest that a dissolution case can be filed in this case is May 2019.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT TERESA TRUDGETT'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or For Undertaking is taken under submission. Counsel to prepare a form of order regarding what to be done with the funds is the court ex punges lis pendens, that those funds be placed in an account until an order from the Australian court is released regarding the distribution. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
